raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settling in","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Sam?","description":"Safe opener that lets Sam set context before anything specific is raised.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Week three map","name":"How has week three felt from your side?","description":"Surfaces how he is actually landing in the role without implying a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Done definition","name":"What does “done” mean to you on your current tickets?","description":"Checks whether his working definition of completion matches the team’s expectation.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Unclear bits","name":"What part of your current work still feels least clear?","description":"Finds the specific ambiguity he is carrying on day-to-day tasks.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Handoff gaps","name":"Where do the handoffs still feel fuzzy?","description":"Maps the exact points in the onboarding flow where ownership or next steps are unclear.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Waiting points","name":"What are you waiting on before you can move the current tickets forward?","description":"Surfaces hidden dependencies and stalled decisions that may not show up as formal blockers.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Shipping hesitation","name":"What feels uncertain right before you ship?","description":"Gets at the moment of hesitation to distinguish confidence dip from missing information or tooling.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support cadence","name":"What kind of check-in from me would help you most over the next two weeks?","description":"Clarifies the support rhythm that would help him move faster without waiting too long for reassurance.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Fastest unblock","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?","description":"Ends by narrowing to the most useful support or change to carry forward from the conversation.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
